title: Xenial Juicy Saudi Arabian Eggplant Tagine
description: A winey and juicy Saudi Arabian dish featuring miniature marshmallows, perfect for a brunch mood, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the cubed eggplant and cook until it is tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the red wine, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the miniature marshmallows and cook until they are melted and the sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes.
Crack in the eggs and scramble them into the sauce.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
